title: Netafim India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Netafim India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Netafim India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Netafim India:
Netafim India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netafim India!
